Video.summary: John must answer for his severe smoking addiction after his girlfriend, Debbie, issues him an ultimatum.
Video.title: Goodman vs. McDonnell

Video.summary: Joshua demands the return of an engagement ring after Eldrick ends their relationship in a viral livestream.
Video.title: Burroughs vs. Steele

Video.summary: A man asked his roommate to watch his puppy when he was out of town, but the puppy died in her care, so he is suing; she says she had nothing to do with the puppy's death and denies owing anything.
Video.title: Paw Prints of Deceit

Video.summary: After four years of hookups, Deja is ready to determine her compatibility with Onika and decide if she will stay or walk away.
Video.title: Lackely vs. Rivera

Video.summary: Choreographer Bryant sues ex-girlfriend and R&B artist Olivia for non-payment of services rendered for a music video.
Video.title: Huey vs. Walker

Video.summary: A woman says her husband is failing to go the distance in their marriage.
Video.title: Covington vs. Covington

Video.summary: Complaints of excessive weight gain have Georgia couple Tasha and Prez at odds.
Video.title: Mack vs. Tate

Video.summary: A paternity battle ignites as Janay seeks justice, while Dale's doubts and secrets keep him on the defensive.
Video.title: Smith vs. Anderson

Video.summary: Is this contractor crooked as a bent nail or is this homeowner's behavior in need of renovations?
Video.title: One Door Closes

Video.summary: Herve Ambwa is accusing his counsin of selling his beloved Wii gaming console Irvin swears he would never do such a thing and that is was stolen due to his roommates negligence.
Video.title: What Happened to the Wii?

Video.summary: Jeretha is petitioning the court for a DNA test to be given to a woman she thinks is her sister.
Video.title: From Strangers to Sisters

Video.summary: A messy breakup leads to a heated dispute over car damage, cheating accusations and a demand for compensation.
Video.title: Dooley vs. Sanders

Video.summary: With help from a substance abuse expert, the judges coach Nohariz and Eli through marital issues and alcohol abuse.
Video.title: Gonzalez vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: Ashley is suing her former friend Terra, for not returning her dog after caring for it while she was in rehab.
Video.title: Tearful Canine Custody Battle

Video.summary: The plaintiff says her sister tried to push her out of a car and strangle her with a seat belt.
Video.title: Sibling Rivalry

Video.summary: Claudette is suing her neighbor for jumping her and falsely accusing her of pullling a gun on her daughter.
Video.title: Gunning for Her Neighbor

Video.summary: An 11-year age difference and an aborted pregnancy put Illinois couple Shakia and Leontae in a power struggle.
Video.title: Yancy vs. Spaulding

Video.summary: Terrell sues girlfriend Kristy for damages because he suspects she is using him for money.
Video.title: Marrow vs. Coleman

Video.summary: A Texas man suspects his girlfriend of cheating with the father of her children.
Video.title: Hicks vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: An unruly puppy and Darius' girlfriend's panty problem has Darius issuing his girlfriend, Ife, an ultimatum.
Video.title: Wilson vs. Graham

Video.summary: An Arkansas woman accuses her husband of being addicted to pornography.
Video.title: Holmes vs. Holmes

Video.summary: Secrets, suspicions and a paternity test collide as a strained couple battle for truth and trust in court.
Video.title: Moore vs. Ariza

Video.summary: A six-year marriage is on the brink of divorce as Quincy sues husband Jeron for failing to pay the bills.
Video.title: King vs. Johnson

Video.summary: The Stallworths bring their relational issues to the Cutlers in a last ditch effort to save their marriage.
Video.title: Stallworth vs Stallworth

Video.summary: Newlyweds Eric and Sarah seek the judges' help navigating kids, careers and compatibility.
Video.title: Orive vs. Stark

Video.summary: Tempers flare when feuding families draw a line down the middle of Raven and Daniel's tumultuous three-year relationship.
Video.title: Briggs vs. Tate

Video.summary: Two sisters who were once tight are now torn apart. Silcray claims her younger sister stole her belongings. Sylvia is shocked and appaled that she'd be accused of such claims after taking her sister into her home.
Video.title: The Tale of Two Sisters

Video.summary: This car-crazy sister claims she was scammed by her big brother's bogus paint job, and wants her money back.
Video.title: The Big Bro Botch

Video.summary: Laura is suing her ex-friend and workmate for a loan. Caylee says Laura offered money without any obligations!
Video.title: The Devil's in the Details

Video.summary: Amanda is suing her ex-best friend Bernardo for thousands spent on bail money to hair care.
Video.title: Ya Booze Ya Lose

Video.summary: Carol is suing her husband for using her money for a bachelor party. Marion argues it was a joint account.
Video.title: The Wedding Thief

Video.summary: Arleen says she generously helped her ex pay his rent, get around town, and that she kept him looking good. Marcus denies it all, claiming her paid all the rent and never took a dime from her.
Video.title: We Can't Make Up Until You Pay for the Makeup!

Image.alt: We Can't Make Up Until You Pay for the Makeup!
We Can't Make Up Until You Pay for the Makeup!
We Can't Make Up Until You Pay for the Makeup!

Video.summary: Comedian Allan Cunningham is suing his former fan for the money she owes him for a private party.
Video.title: Heckling the Plaintiff

Video.summary: Jasmine and Drayson are suing each other over a security deposit due a flea infestation.
Video.title: Welcome to the Flea Circus

Video.summary: Shaneequa loved her precious pooch but when she could no longer care for her she found a friend that could.
Video.title: Screwing the Pooch

Video.summary: Daryl is suing his ex-friend for missing belongings that he believes were sold to fuel a gambling addiction.
Video.title: Gambling the Friendship

Video.summary: Sean Amey is suing his former roommates for his security deposit after being forced out of the apartment through calculated scheming. The roommates admit to lying but say that he deserved it.
Video.title: Rowdy Roommate Ruckus

Video.summary: Nigel says that he got ripped off. Now he wants his money back from producer Daunte.
Video.title: Beating the Bank

Video.summary: Cate sues Ann Rosa for $1,140, claiming Ann sold her a defective pellet stove, misrepresenting it as functional. Ann argues the stove worked when sold, and any issues are Cate’s responsibility.
Video.title: Fireworks Over a Faulty Stove

Video.summary: Erica Hinton sues Bethania Rincon for $900, claiming bleach spilled on her expensive MCM bag at a salon. Bethania argues the damage was from oil stains and cleaning spray after Erica placed food on the bag.
Video.title: You Bleached My Designer Bag

Video.summary: Frank sues his daughter Patricia, claiming she pocketed $2,010 in insurance money after a car accident. Patricia says the car was a gift, she paid insurance, and blames his new partner for turning him against her.
Video.title: Father/Daughter Crisis

Video.summary: Corinne sues ex-boss Walter for $5,000, claiming unpaid wages, harassment, and abuse. Walter denies the claims, asserting he paid her and countersues for $545.04, accusing her of a shakedown.
Video.title: Harassed by Her Boss?

Video.summary: Elizabeth sues Alexis for $2,162, saying Alexis rented her house for a graduation party and caused major damages, including a broken door. Alexis denies the claims, insists she cleaned up, and accuses Elizabeth of overreacting for money
Video.title: Your Teenagers Trashed My House

Video.summary: Renoda sues her ex’s girlfriend, Cheryl, for $787, alleging she slashed her tires, broke a window, and posted an explicit video online. Cheryl countersues for $1,551, claiming Renoda keyed her car.
Video.title: Sex Tape Scandal

Video.summary: Jada is suing her mother for $4,000 in unreturned property after kicking her out of the house.
Video.title: Smart Mouth and Bad Attitude

Video.summary: Allison says her baby daddy rarely sees their child, and she is suing for the cost of ballet classes and bills
Video.title: Too Passionate for Parenting

Video.summary: Andrew is suing Rachel after buying a lemon car due to her distracting him by dressing provacatively.
Video.title: Car Sale Gone Sour

Video.summary: A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for rent and emotional distress because he cheated on her with their roommate.
Video.title: The Roommate Affair
